en: I've given the Prime Minister my personal assurance you're on the case.
ko: 총리에게 네가 맡고 있다고 직접 보증했어.

en: I'm on the case. We're both on the case.
ko: 맡고 있지. 우리 둘 다 맡고 있어.

en: Look at us right now. Oh, bugger!
Oopsie. Can't handle a broken heart. How very telling.
ko: 이런. 실연도 못 견디다니. 참 말해주는 게 많네.

en: Don't be smart. That takes me back.
ko: 잘난 척하지 마. 그 말 들으니 옛날 생각나네.

en: Don't be smart, Sherlock. I'm the smart one. I am the smart one.
ko: 잘난 척하지 마, Sherlock. 내가 똑똑한 쪽이야. 내가 똑똑한 거라고.

en: I used to think I was an idiot.
Both of us thought you were an idiot, Sherlock.
ko: 우리 둘 다 네가 바보인 줄 알았어, Sherlock.

en: We had nothing else to go on till we met other children.
ko: 다른 아이들을 만나기 전까지는 비교할 게 없었으니까.

en: Oh, yes, that was a mistake.
Ghastly. What were they thinking of?
Probably something about trying to make friends.
ko: 걔들은 뭘 생각한 거야? 아마 친구를 사귀려고 한 거겠지.
